name: PromptCrafter
short_description: Command line crafting game with procedurally generated crafting trees and programming-like automation.
detailed_description:
Description

  • Your ultimate goal is to craft the omega element.

  • You start with the generate command, which creates an alpha element.

  • You unlock new features from shop with buy command.

  • You can create new elements from the existing ones using pack, merge and cut commands.

  • Crafting recipes are hidden by default. When the elements of the recipes have been present in the storage, they become visible.

  • You can create custom commands to automate your game. For example 'g = generate generage' creates command g, which executes generate-command twice.

  • Crafting trees are procedurally generated.

Scoring

  • Command Typing Speed - Faster typing speed yields a better score.

  • Command Efficiency - A smaller command count yields a better score.

  • Storage Efficiency - A smaller storage value yields a better score.
